Motion To Compel - Further Responses To Judicial Council Form Interrogatories And Provide Verifications To Discovery Responses
Off Calendar Nov-28-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Spencer Johnson, Esq. 619-744-6800 of Santa Cruz, Brownwood & Cannon for Defendant ALLISON TITTIGER et al. through Court Call.
No other Appearance.

RULING - The matter is Unopposed. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT ALLISON TITTIGER, ANN TITTIGER, FRANZ TITTIGER's Motion To Compel - Further Responses To Judicial Council Form Interrogatories And Provide Verifications To Discovery Responses.

The motion is unopposed and is granted. Sanctions are denied. Further responses will be due thirty days after date of order.

Moving party is required to prepare a proposed order in Word version repeating verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling via email to jameshfleming@gmail.com.

Judge Pro Tem: James Fleming, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not reported. =(302/JPT)
